en: No, it's not big. Not at all.
You know, kind of the same lines as, say, oh, I don't know, having a third nipple.
ko: 음, 뭐랄까, 비슷한 수준의 비밀로 치면.
세 번째 유두가 있다는 것 같은 거.

en: Whip it out. Whip it out.
Come on. There's nothing to see. It's just a tiny bump. It's totally useless.
ko: 어서. 볼 게 없어. 그냥 작은 돌기일 뿐이야. 완전히 쓸모없어.

en: Oh, as opposed to your other multifunctional nipples.
ko: 아, 너의 다른 다기능 유두와는 다르게.

en: I can't believe you. You told me it was a nubbin.
ko: 믿을 수 없어, 너는 나한테 그게

en: Joey, what do you think a nubbin was?
I don't know. You see something. You hear a word. I thought that's what it was.

ko: 그게 그런 거라고 생각했어, 다시 보여줘.

en: Joey, it was in a porno movie.
If I'm going down, I'm taking everybody with me.
All right, all right, all right. I was young, and I just wanted a job, okay?
ko: 알겠어, 알겠어, 알겠어. 그때는 어렸고, 그냥 일하고 싶었어, 알겠지?

en: But at the last minute, I couldn't...
ko: 하지만 마지막 순간에 실행할 수 없어서 복사기를 고치러 오는 사람으로 남게 됐어.
